cpu: AMD A8-3870 APU with Radeon(tm) HD Graphics
notes: Game works fine and without any issues. Just after some time it minimizes. Can be restored afterwards but just appears as a small window with the original solution. Other than that all good.
title: STAR WARS™ Rebellion

notes:
The opening videos play, however there is no sound.
Main menu appears to be functioning correctly.
Single player game launches, audio works properly after video finishes. 
Most of the game screens appear to work, however the dropdown menu used for selecting manufacturing (ships/troops/facilities) and for choosing mission types does not appear when selected. 
When a ship battle occurs and I select to manually control the battle, the game gives two error windows:
["Unrecognized error value."]
[D3DRMERR_BADVALUE]
After this the game closes out.

With these two issues, the game is not currently playable.
title: STAR WARS™ Rebellion
